description: LLM second-brain vault scaffold: seed pages, agent snippets, and setup docs for multi-agent knowledge management.
secret_policy: Never installs auth tokens, credentials, API keys, local router URLs, or machine-specific paths. Vault data is create-if-absent and never uninstall-deleted.
notes: Vault content (seed pages, .gitignore, raw/, wiki/) is created only if absent. Uninstall never deletes vault data, .git history, or user-authored pages.
